API Documentation

\n
\n GET\n /api/quick-search?q=query\n

\n
\n
\n GET\n /api/bookmarks\n

\n
\n
\n POST\n /api/bookmarks\n

\n
\n
\n GET\n /api/folders\n

Get all folders

Navigation

\n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n
Ctrl+Shift+D / Cmd+Shift+DGo to Dashboard
Ctrl+Shift+F / Cmd+Shift+FGo to Favorites
Ctrl+Shift+A / Cmd+Shift+AGo to All Bookmarks
\n Ctrl+1 to Ctrl+9 / Cmd+1 to\n Cmd+9\n Jump to folder 1-9
\n
\n
\n

Bookmarks

\n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n
Ctrl+N / Cmd+NAdd new bookmark
Ctrl+F / Cmd+FFocus search
Ctrl+K / Cmd+KFocus search (alternative)
Ctrl+A / Cmd+ASelect all bookmarks
\n
\n
\n

General

\n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n
Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+POpen command palette
EscClose modals and selections
↓ / ↑Navigate command palette (when open)
